test.command: pnpm exec vitest run ui/src/ packages/orchestrator-tui/ --max-workers=3

nonBlockingIssues.description: ThemeContext tests rely heavily on source-string assertions and have weak runtime behavior coverage for data-theme application and persistence/rehydration.

appliedUpdates.description: Added agent-browser CLI usage note to .factory/library/user-testing.md recommending `--session ... eval` for scripted navigation/actions.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify or enforce validation scope and ordering: either require `pnpm exec vitest run packages/orchestrator-tui/ --max-workers=3` in GUI worker handoffs and tests-first sequencing, or update the skill to match accepted GUI-only validation behavior.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both gui-themes reviews observed handoffs marked followedProcedure=true while reporting only UI tests + typecheck and implementation-before-tests behavior, diverging from SKILL.md steps 3 and 6.

rejectedObservations.observation: gui-worker procedure requires running TUI tests in addition to UI tests and typecheck (reported by both reviews).
